name: openscad
long_description: Model Context Protocol server for OpenSCAD 3D modeling language. Provides tools for rendering, analyzing, and manipulating OpenSCAD designs through Claude and other LLMs.

tools.name: render_scad
tools.description: Render SCAD file to PNG with camera control (position, rotation, zoom)

tools.name: render_perspectives
tools.description: Render 6 perspectives (front, back, left, right, top, bottom) of a SCAD model

tools.name: compare_renders
tools.description: Render two designs side-by-side for visual comparison

tools.name: export_scad
tools.description: Export SCAD model to 3D formats: STL, 3MF, AMF, OFF, DXF, or SVG

tools.name: validate_scad
tools.description: Syntax-check SCAD code without rendering to detect errors

tools.name: analyze_model
tools.description: Analyze model geometry and extract metrics (bounds, complexity, etc)

tools.name: parse_dependencies
tools.description: Extract include and use statements from SCAD files to build dependency graph

tools.name: detect_circular
tools.description: Find circular dependencies in file includes (A→B→A patterns)

tools.name: create_model
tools.description: Create new SCAD files with specified content and path

tools.name: get_model
tools.description: Read SCAD file content and metadata (size, modified time, etc)

tools.name: update_model
tools.description: Modify existing SCAD files with new content or append code

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all SCAD files in a directory with optional filtering

tools.name: delete_model
tools.description: Delete SCAD files safely with optional batch operations

tools.name: check_openscad
tools.description: Verify OpenSCAD installation and get version information

tools.name: get_libraries
tools.description: Discover installed OpenSCAD libraries and their locations

tools.name: get_project_files
tools.description: List all project files and build dependency graph for analysis

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description: Clear the render cache to free disk space or reset cached renders

OPENSCAD_PATH.title: Custom OpenSCAD binary location
OPENSCAD_PATH.description: Path to custom OpenSCAD binary if not in PATH

SCAD_RENDER_TIMEOUT.title: Render timeout
SCAD_RENDER_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum time in seconds for render operations (default: 300)
